# Web By Elie

Web By Elie helps independent businesses refresh existing websites, improve
search clarity, prepare site structure for AI-assisted search, and review
avoidable web/tooling costs.

## Canonical Site

- Home: https://web-by-elie.com/
- French: https://web-by-elie.com/fr/
- Spanish: https://web-by-elie.com/es/
- Privacy: https://web-by-elie.com/privacy
- Terms: https://web-by-elie.com/terms
- Data deletion: https://web-by-elie.com/data-deletion

## Services

- Website refresh: preserve useful existing website work, compare real visual
  options, and prepare a final site direction.
- Search Engine Optimization: review titles, descriptions, headings, links,
  service wording, locations, and page structure.
- AI-ready structure: make basic business facts easier for people, search
  engines, and AI assistants to understand.
- Web spend cleanup: review unused subscriptions, overlapping tools, paid
  tiers, renewals, and account ownership gaps.

## Important Notes

- SEO and AI-search work can improve clarity and technical readiness, but no
  ranking, traffic, lead, or AI-answer placement is guaranteed.
- Most projects begin with a practical 10-hour initial bundle.
- Work is tracked at 100 USD per hour, with a check-in at 50% of the retainer.
- Contact: hello@web-by-elie.com
